title: Magma Caverns
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Magma_caverns.jpg|thumb|right|150px|[[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] arrives at the Magma Caverns.]]

The '''Magma Caverns''' were a labyrinth of tunnels, created by the lava rivers from the several [[Volcano/Legends|volcanoes]] of [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]]. It was placed under the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]].

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] installed a [[Saleucami Cloning Complex|Cloning Complex]] in order to create an army of [[Morgukai]] [[Cloning/Legends|clones]]. It also was a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base to many Confederacy characters, such as the [[Anzat (species)|Anzat]] [[Rath Kelkko]], the last true Morgukai [[Bok]], the Dark Jedi [[Tol Skorr]] and Sora Bulq himself.

{{Loc-stub}}
